title: schefflera scortechinii
intro: Schefflera scortechinii, also known as the Malaysian umbrella tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Schefflera scortechinii include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and treat various respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas or infusions, and it is also used as a tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
